basicFormatter.description: Formatter settings for the basic formatter. The basic formatter is the default formatter.

indent.description: Indentation level in spaces for formatted YAML.

line_ending.description: Parse and write files with LF or CRLF line endings.

retain_line_breaks.description: Retain line breaks in formatted YAML.

retain_line_breaks_single.description: Retain line breaks but collapse runs of blank lines to a single blank line.

disallow_anchors.description: Reject YAML anchors and aliases found in the document.

max_line_length.description: Maximum line length. A value of 0 means no limit.

scan_folded_as_literal.description: Preserve newlines in folded block scalars that start with >.

indentless_arrays.description: Render block sequence items without an increased indent.

drop_merge_tag.description: Drop the !!merge tag from well-formed merge keys that use <<.

pad_line_comments.description: Number of padding spaces inserted before line comments.

eof_newline.description: Always add a newline at end of file.

strip_directives.description: Attempt to strip YAML directives before formatting and put them back afterwards.

array_indent.description: Indentation level for block sequences. A value of 0 keeps the formatter default behavior.

indent_root_array.description: Indent an array that appears at the root indentation level of the document.

disable_alias_key_correction.description: Disable correction for alias nodes used as mapping keys.

force_array_style.description: Force arrays to be written in flow or block style. Leave empty to preserve the original style.

force_quote_style.description: Force quoted scalars to use single or double quotes. Leave empty to preserve the original style.

kyamlFormatter.description: Formatter settings for the kyaml formatter.

formatter.description: Formatter settings. The basic formatter is the default formatter; kyaml is an alternate formatter type.

line_ending.description: Parse and write files with LF or CRLF line endings. This global setting overrides formatter-level line ending settings.

doublestar.description: Use doublestar for include and exclude paths.

continue_on_error.description: Continue formatting and do not exit with code 1 when an invalid YAML file is found.

match_type.description: Controls how include and exclude paths are interpreted.

include.description: Paths to include for formatting. In gitignore mode these are files containing gitignore-style patterns.

exclude.description: Paths to exclude from formatting. This option is ignored in gitignore mode.

gitignore_excludes.description: Use gitignore files for exclude paths in addition to exclude patterns.

gitignore_path.description: Path to the gitignore file used when gitignore exclusions are enabled.

regex_exclude.description: Go regular expressions matched against file contents; matching files are excluded.

extensions.description: File extensions used for standard path collection. An empty list keeps the default .yaml and .yml extensions.

output_format.description: Output format used for stdout and stderr messages.
